job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: JPC Partners
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract W2
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 24, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/d9a3b3eb-51b8-4459-a559-e7c6230a5486

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare data migration role posted 6 days ago on Dice.
- Focuses on legacy-to-AWS healthcare data migration, profiling, source-to-target mapping, transformation rules, ETL/ELT validation, data quality, and governance.
- Healthcare datasets include clinical, claims, provider, patient, eligibility, billing, and EHR/EMR data.
- Requires advanced SQL, healthcare data standards, PHI/PII handling, and ETL concepts/tools.
strengths: Excellent match for source-to-target mapping, ETL validation, SQL profiling, reconciliation, and healthcare data quality.
Claims, eligibility, provider, patient, and PHI/PII data themes align with payer data background.
Power BI/Tableau tracking and UAT support align with reporting validation and stakeholder work.
gaps: AWS migration ownership and HL7/FHIR/SNOMED depth are stronger than the base resume supports.
10+ years requirement is above the 7+ years profile; treat as a stretch.
notes: Apply if time. Strong functional fit, but position asks for AWS healthcare migration and 10+ years; tailor truthfully to ETL validation, mapping, SQL, data profiling, and healthcare domain data.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | ETL Migration Validation | SQL Data Quality
